WARNING: CS holds this. It maps each eval-site display label (A/B per question) back to the R-code. WITHHELD from the operator until the operator's evaluation is submitted. Unblinding to arm ALSO needs Key-1 (operator-held R-code→arm). Neither key alone reveals arm.
unblinding: Final unblind = compose Key-1 (operator: Rcode→arm) ∘ this Key-2 (label→Rcode) → label→arm. Produces blinding_key_FULL.json. Only then does make_analysis.py compute L−B.
